content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Sequence with Digits". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1355/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print YES if the sequence is good, otherwise print NO.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check each pair of adjacent elements in the sequence to see if the digits are in non-decreasing order.
